title: Intro to Machine Learning Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering supervised learning basics with Python and scikit-learn.

title: Campus Hackathon Kickoff
description: Opening ceremony and team formation for the 48-hour campus hackathon.

title: Open Mic Night
description: Students showcase music, poetry, and comedy. Sign-ups at the door.

title: Career Fair — Tech Companies
description: Meet recruiters from 30+ tech companies. Bring resumes and dress professionally.

title: Debate Championship Finals
description: Final round of the inter-college debate championship. Open to all spectators.

title: Weekend Film Screening: Interstellar
description: Outdoor screening with popcorn and blankets provided. Rain location: Student Center.

title: Intramural Soccer Tournament
description: Single-elimination tournament. Register your team by Friday.

title: Sustainability Panel Discussion
description: Faculty and students discuss campus carbon-neutral goals and student-led projects.

title: Chess Blitz Tournament
description: 5-minute blitz rounds. All skill levels welcome. Prizes for top 3.

title: End-of-Semester Cultural Fest
description: Food stalls, dance performances, art exhibitions, and live music celebrating campus diversity.
